nl_query: Show the daily scanning velocity for each exam in December 2025: the number of scripts scanned per day, the change from the previous day, and the number of new bundles opened.
failed_sql: SELECT e.exam_date, COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) AS scripts_scanned, (COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) - LAG(COUNT(DISTINCT b.id)) OVER (PARTITION BY e.exam_id ORDER BY e.exam_date)) AS change_from_previous_day, COUNT(CASE WHEN b.status = 'OPEN' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS new_bundles_opened FROM exam_schedule_cache e JOIN bundle b ON e.exam_id = b.exam_id WHERE e.exam_date BETWEEN '2025-12-01' AND '2025-12-31' GROUP BY e.exam_date ORDER BY e.exam_date;
